title: Diagnosis of Hand Tremor from EMG Sensors
author: Mousa Murayshid AL-Mutari
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this paper, the experimental procedure for the acquisition of EMG and accelerometer data is explained. From the data, tremor frequency is evaluated. Tremor is an involuntary shaking of the body or the limbs which is considered as an early symptom of Parkinson’s disease. EMG instrument, sensors, selection of muscles in the study, data acquisition procedure, analysis of EMG and accelerometer signal is discussed in this paper.
steps_raw: In this paper, the experimental procedure for the acquisition of EMG and accelerometer data is explained. From the data, tremor frequency is evaluated. Tremor is an involuntary shaking of the body or the limbs which is considered as an early symptom of Parkinson’s disease. keywords: Parkinson's disease; tremor frequency; ECG acquisition; muscular rigidity
